title: Locate, record and collect forensic samples
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Locate, record and collect forensic samples demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Prepare for evidence/sample collection

pcs.text: Locate evidence/sample using observation and appropriate detection methods
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate evidence/sample using observation and appropriate detection methods?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate evidence/sample using observation and appropriate detection methods.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify appropriate sample collection methods?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify appropriate sample collection methods.

pcs.text: Prioritise the evaluation of items of evidence to ensure maintenance of sample integrity

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prioritise the evaluation of items of evidence to ensure maintenance of sample integrity.

elements.title: Record locations and details of evidence/samples

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify appropriate methods to record the evidence/samples in accordance with quality systems and within resource constraints.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record position of located evidence using a variety of appropriate techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record position of located evidence using a variety of appropriate techniques.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Produce documented records of evidential material according to judicial and/or workplace guidelines.

elements.title: Collect evidence/samples

pcs.text: Collect sufficient number and quantity of evidence/samples to allow complete examination or analysis and to represent the mass of the physical evidence

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect sufficient number and quantity of evidence/samples to allow complete examination or analysis and to represent the mass of the physical evidence.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect controls and reference samples where possible and appropriate?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect controls and reference samples where possible and appropriate.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect latent evidence using physical or chemical methods?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect latent evidence using physical or chemical methods.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Collect evidence/samples

elements.title: Package evidence/samples

pcs.text: Package, transport and store evidence/samples to ensure continuity and maintain integrity of forensic samples
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Package, transport and store evidence/samples to ensure continuity and maintain integrity of forensic samples?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Package, transport and store evidence/samples to ensure continuity and maintain integrity of forensic samples.

pcs.text: Collect and document details of evidential material in case notes and/or in the evidence register to maintain chain of custody
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect and document details of evidential material in case notes and/or in the evidence register to maintain chain of custody?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect and document details of evidential material in case notes and/or in the evidence register to maintain chain of custody.
